creator: danmason@danmason.net
text:
Looks like this is the same bug as kern/171524.

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=171524


On Tue, Feb 19, 2013 at 2:23 PM, Dan Mason <danmason@danmason.net> wrote:

> I'm also seeing this behaviour in FreeBSD 9.1-RELEASE.
>
> This PR says this is a non-critical severity / low-priority bug but doing
> a fsck and a gmirror rebuld on mostly empty 1TB disks is painful, having it
> happen frequently on almost every reboot makes the system unusable.
>
> From what I've seen the only work around is to disable soft-update
> journaling?
>
>
> Dan
>
> --
> Daniel Mason
> Systems Engineer
> danmason@danmason.net
>
> "and all you touch and all you see, is all your life will ever be"
>



-- 
Daniel Mason
